unexported_key_funcs: entityLabelForBucket — rewrites Module to ProtocolImplementation when module_kind=protocol_implementation (materialize_labels.go:3)
entitySourceCache — prefers parser Source for code labels, falls back to file-body line range (source_cache.go:22)
limitEntitySourceCache — truncates Variable snippet at 4096 bytes, writes truncation metadata (source_cache.go:50)
telemetry: none — callers (ingester workers) add metrics around the call
key_invariants: contentEntityBuckets order is fixed — reordering changes persisted row order
entityEndLine falls back to next entity's startLine-1, then startLine+24 cap, then startLine when body is empty
Variable source_cache capped at 4096 bytes; source_cache_truncated, source_cache_original_bytes, source_cache_limit_bytes written to metadata when truncated
Entities sorted by line number, then label, then name — deterministic output across runs
Materialize returns error when RepoID is empty or any file Path is empty
